title: ISSA CPT
html:
International Sports Sciences Association — Certified Personal Trainer credential. Yahir worked toward this cert mid-2025 as the load-bearing leg of his no runway / Austin move bridge-income strategy — the cert unlocked Planet Fitness floor work and eventually Lift ATX in Austin. Functions in the timeline as the physical-world anchor while Brotein / Rankett were software-only.

TL;DR

  • 19 inbound citations — heavily concentrated in the May 2025 → Dec 2025 bridge-income window.
  • First named in 2025 05 30 todos: "pay for the ISSA exam", "call ISSA and get start on the things."
  • Funded partially via Al Forthan scholarship leftovers (2025 08 13 plan for austin).
  • Resume-ready by Oct 2025 (2025 10 20 quality resume) — credentialed before the Austin landing.
  • Practical application: 2025 11 04 personal training approach documents the gym-floor sales method built on ISSA frameworks.
  • Continued into Austin via Lift ATX (2025 12 20 how to make lift atx better).

Key facts

  • Bridge-income, not career. ISSA serves the Brotein/Rankett build — never positioned as the destination.
  • Anabolic-scoring intuition. The cert reinforced Yahir's anabolic scoring thinking that powered BroMenu's data model.
  • NaviWell adjacency. 2025 09 08 naviwell charting workflow — ISSA chart workflow informs NaviWell.
  • Workout splits. 2026 02 23 new lifting split / 2024 02 29 workout split — Yahir's own training shows ISSA influence years before formal cert.
  • Lift ATX deployment. 2025 12 20 how to make lift atx better — applied to Austin gym work.

Chronological arc

  • Pre-2025 — proto-knowledge (2024 02 29 workout split shows ISSA-style programming intuition).
  • 2025-05-30 — formally pursuing cert (2025 05 30 todos).
  • 2025-08-13 — funded via scholarship leftover (2025 08 13 plan for austin).
  • 2025-09-08 — NaviWell workflow integration (2025 09 08 naviwell charting workflow).
  • 2025-10-20 — credentialed and resume-ready (2025 10 20 quality resume).
  • 2025-11-04 — gym-floor sales method documented (2025 11 04 personal training approach).
  • 2025-12-20 — Lift ATX application (2025 12 20 how to make lift atx better).
  • 2026-02-23 — own-training continues (2026 02 23 new lifting split).

Source summaries

All 7 direct + 12 cross-page citations:

  • 2025 05 30 todos — first naming
  • 2025 08 13 plan for austin — funding mechanism
  • 2025 09 08 naviwell charting workflow
  • 2025 10 20 quality resume
  • 2025 11 04 personal training approach — applied method
  • 2025 12 20 how to make lift atx better
  • 2026 02 23 new lifting split

Connections

  • planet fitness · lift atx · naviwell group — gym-work venues
  • brotein · anabolic scoring — software-side spillover
  • no runway discipline · bridge income strategies — operating frame
  • the austin thesis — strategic context
  • corvallis or · austin tx — geographic context
